creator: pankov_p@mail.ru
text: Here is the patch to update port www/youtube_dl to the version from 2006.08.28. It also adds my own master site, because author does'n keep old version of software on his site. If the formatting of the patch here is broken, it can be fetched from http://pankovpv.sovietservers.com/freebsd/ports/youtube_dl.patch .
